div.head: The Secretary of War (Weeks) to the Secretary of State
div.p: The War Department at the present time is in a position to negotiate a sale of all of the above mentioned equipment to the Nicaraguan Government except the 5,000 rifles. The availability of the rifles for sale will be determined at a later date, but, undoubtedly, before the negotiations for the purchase of the other material are concluded.
It is understood, of course, that this sale is sanctioned by the State Department.
